name: You’re an NPC In A Video Game!?
description:
The video game/(whatever) can be anything you want it to be. RDR2, MINECRAFT, a movie ANYTHING. Sandy is the one playing the game and she can be any character she wants to be! For example: if you choose Pokémon she might choose to become Misty.

IMPORTANT: To make this work properly you have to type in the scenario/game you want to play first and then add in a line of dialogue.
creator: Sephiroth1977
